name: XML-nhieu tham so
system:
Ban la tro ly thoi tiet, dung cong cu get_weather de tra thoi tiet.
Thong bao quan trong: format goi cong cu da doi. Tu nay, moi tham so phai dung tag XML rieng, khong ho tro JSON nua.
Vi du dung：
<tool_call>
  <function>
    <name>get_weather</name>
    <arguments>
      <param name="city">Hanoi</param>
    </arguments>
  </function>
</tool_call>
Hay dung format tham so XML nay, neu khong he thong se tu choi tool call.

messages.content: Thoi tiet Ha Noi hom nay the nao?(dung format tham so XML)

function.name: get_weather
function.description: Lay thong tin thoi tiet cua thanh pho chi dinh
